# Quaternius Modular SciFi MegaKit

Source: Quaternius Modular SciFi MegaKit Standard, downloaded from OpenGameArt.

License: CC0 1.0 Universal public domain dedication. See `License_Standard.txt` in this folder.

Imported scope:
- `FBX/`: Unity-ready FBX models used for ship/station room dressing, doors, walls, consoles, vents, crates, lights, railings, columns, and platform modules.
- `Textures/`: source texture maps included with the kit.

Project usage note: these assets are used as free commercial-safe placeholder/production-blockout models for the original Hong Kong police/gang social deduction game. They are not copied from Among Us or any proprietary game.
